error.account_blocked: Your account has been blocked by Securitas. Use 'Forgot password' on the Securitas website to reset your password and unblock your account, then try again
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Securitas Direct
error.otp_expired: Verification code expired — a new code will be sent
error.otp_send_failed: Failed to send verification code — please try again

reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Securitas Direct
reauth_confirm.description: Your session has expired. Please re-enter your password to reconnect.

phone_list.title: Securitas Direct 2FA

otp_challenge.description: Enter the code you received on your phone
otp_challenge.title: Securitas Direct 2FA

data.code: PIN Code (leave empty for no PIN)
data.code_arm_required: Also require PIN code (if any) to arm alarm
data.notify_group: Notify service for arming exceptions (e.g. mobile_app_phone)

data.scan_interval: Update scan interval in seconds (0 disables auto-updates)

mappings.title: Alarm State Mappings
mappings.description: Map each Home Assistant alarm action to a Securitas alarm mode. Set to 'Not used' to disable a button.

data.code: PIN Code (leave empty for no PIN)
data.code_arm_required: Also require PIN code (if any) to arm alarm
data.notify_group: Notify service for arming exceptions (e.g. mobile_app_phone)

data.scan_interval: Update scan interval in seconds (0 disables auto-updates)

mappings.title: Alarm State Mappings
mappings.description: Map each Home Assistant alarm action to a Securitas alarm mode. Set to 'Not used' to disable a button.

force_arm.name: Force arm
force_arm.description: Force-arm the alarm, overriding non-blocking exceptions (e.g. open windows) from a previous failed arm attempt.

force_arm_cancel.name: Cancel force arm
force_arm_cancel.description: Cancel a pending force-arm and dismiss the arming-exception notification.
